pageContext.name: Monkey D. Luffy (Duel Memories)
pageContext.description: Bandai Spirits Ichibansho is proud to announce their newest release, the Monkey D. Luffy (Duel Memories) Statue!   This statue is expertly crafted and meticulously sculpted to look like Monkey D. Luffy from the hit anime One Piece. Standing at approximately 4.7' tall, Monkey D. Luffy is seen striking their familiar and iconic pose.   One Piece fans, be sure to enhance your anime figure collection with the Monkey D. Luffy statue today!
